title: Settings & Customization
description: Make Linux your own! Change backgrounds, explore settings, and express yourself.

steps.instruction: Click the Settings icon (⚙️) in the dock to open GNOME Settings.
steps.hint: The gear icon (⚙️) in the dock opens Settings. Click it!

steps.instruction: You're in Settings! The 'Background' section should be selected. Pick a new wallpaper to customize your desktop!
steps.hint: Click one of the wallpaper previews to change your desktop background.

steps.instruction: Nice new look! Click 'About' in the sidebar to see info about your system.
steps.hint: Click 'About' (ℹ️) in the left sidebar of Settings.
